entity.summary: Concordium-based decentralized exchange with a live mainnet application, remaining protocol liquidity, and historical on-chain trading activity.
entity.notes: The first-party site and mainnet application remain live. Protocol data reports remaining TVL and substantial cumulative DEX volume, though reviewed fee windows were zero; active status is retained based on the operational application surface.

evidence.title: Concordex official DEX website
evidence.notes: First-party site presents the institutional-grade DEX and links to its mainnet application and analytics.

evidence.title: Concordex protocol profile and metrics
evidence.notes: Protocol profile identifies Concordex as a Concordium AMM DEX and reports remaining TVL and cumulative DEX volume.
